videos.headline: Marvin Harrison Jr. gets Ohio State on the board early with a TD
videos.description: Ohio State QB Kyle McCord throws a 14-yard TD to WR Marvin Harrison Jr. early in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Marvin Harrison Jr. gets Ohio State on the board early with a TD) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Devin Brown pads OSU's lead with rushing TD
videos.description: Devin Brown pads OSU's lead with rushing TD

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Devin Brown pads OSU’s lead with rushing TD) 2023/10/14

videos.headline: Cade Stover's TD catch gives Ohio State a 20-0 lead before halftime
videos.description: Ohio State QB Kyle McCord completes a 4-yard TD pass to TE Cade Stover before the half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cade Stover's TD catch gives Ohio State a 20-0 lead before halftime) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ohio State TE Cade Stover gets another TD against Purdue
videos.description: Ohio State QB Kyle McCord throws another touchdown pass to Cade Stover in the third quarter to give the Buckeyes a 34-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ohio State TE Cade Stover gets another TD against Purdue) 2023/10/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Devin Brown throws a 58-yard TD to Brandon Inniss for Ohio State
videos.description: Ohio State QB Devin Brown throws a deep 58-yard TD pass to WR Brandon Inniss to put Ohio State up 41-7 against Purdue.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Devin Brown throws a 58-yard TD to Brandon Inniss for Ohio State) 2023/10/14 ESHEET
